body.title: CC chat mirror — 5-min refresh of today's file (drop hourly --all)
body.result: Cadence 3600s→300s, dropped --all (default mode = newest session = today). REFRESH_INTERVAL_SEC class constant. 6 new tests pass.
body.description:
StaleChatLogBackfiller in wild_igor/igor/cognition/push_sources.py runs export_chat.py --all once per HOUR (3600s). Result: today's mirror at ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/CC.0/YYYY-MM-DD.md drifts up to 60min stale. Akien's request: 5-min refresh for today, no historical rebuild needed.

Fix:
- Change cadence 3600s → 300s
- Drop --all flag (default mode already targets newest session, which is today)
- Optional: keep an --all backfill at /day-close or daily cron (not in this ticket; file separate if needed)

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/push_sources.py (StaleChatLogBackfiller class).
**Design rules:** none apply (cadence + flag tweak; no schema or interface change).
**Scope boundary:** in scope: cadence 5min + drop --all. Out of scope: rewriting export_chat.py, full ADC LoggingControlCenter migration (covered by T-logging-* tickets).
**Test plan:** existing test for StaleChatLogBackfiller (if any) updated for new cadence; otherwise add a small test asserting the 300s threshold. After deploy, observe today's CC.0 mirror updates within 5min.
